original_image_tags: Color photograph of a tan manila file folder, slightly worn, lying flat. The folder has several labels and handwritten markings.

elements.description: An image of a brown manila envelope cover featuring multiple administrative labels and stamps. It includes a white label from the 'FBI - CENTRAL RECORDS CENTER' with a barcode and case details, a 'DO NOT DESTROY' stamp, a white label on the right with 'HQ-83894', a barcode, and 'Serials EBF 164', a blue sticker at the bottom reading 'Declassification authority derived from FBI Automatic Declassification Guide, issued May 24, 2007.', and various handwritten annotations in black and red ink, including 'FOIPA # 1142292'.

judge.reason: Description B provides extensive specific quoted text and visual details (FBI label, barcodes, stamps, handwritten annotations) not present in the generic Description A, creating a contradiction in the level of visual content described.
